title: tengine.session.client_connected v1
description: An IPC client connected to the silo socket. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SESSION_CLIENT_CONNECTED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'session_{session_id}'. Emitted before the client identifies itself with an agent_id (see tengine.session.client_identified).

client_idx.description: slot index of this client in the silo's connection table

session_id.description: monotonic per-silo client session counter; mirrored in the CloudEvents subject as 'session_{n}'

connected_frame.description: GPU frame index when the connection was accepted

occupancy.description: number of clients currently connected to the silo socket after this connect
